response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, testing rigor, and leadership abilities across diverse tech stacks, he falls substantially short of critical minimum qualifications. Most notably, he has approximately one year of C++ experience versus an eight-year minimum requirement, and his infrastructure and distributed systems work is secondary to product development in most roles rather than demonstrating dedicated focus. The role requires deep expertise in C++ and cloud compute infrastructure as a foundation for technical leadership, and this candidate's background is that of a versatile full-stack engineer rather than an infrastructure specialist.
strengths: Proven technical leadership at Staff level with demonstrated mentoring, knowledge-sharing, and establishing best practices across teams
Strong emphasis on testing practices, TDD, code quality, and software craftsmanship throughout career
Shipped multiple products across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with understanding of full product lifecycle
concerns: Approximately one year of C++ experience (National Instruments 2014-2015) against the eight-year minimum requirement
Infrastructure and distributed systems work is secondary to product development in most roles; unclear if five dedicated years exist in this domain
No evidence of technical leadership specifically in cloud or DevOps engineering teams; leadership experience is in product engineering

key_factors.factor: Large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems focus
